displayNameZh: 自制 extract.py 工具动画
summary: Yt Extract Tool component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「自制 extract.py 工具动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-extract-tool/src/YtExtractTool.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtExtractTool` and `ytExtractToolDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Extract Tool Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-extract-tool to my project. Preserve the exported YtExtractToolProps API and register the YtExtractTool composition with the default props.
